title: Add Watermark to PDF — Offline Watermarking
h1: Stamp PDFs with Text or Image Watermarks Locally
description: Add "CONFIDENTIAL", logos, or custom text watermarks to PDFs entirely in your browser. No upload. Best for users in São Paulo.

sections.title: Why Watermark PDFs Offline?
sections.content: Adding watermarks means your document is sensitive. Never upload draft contracts or confidential reports to a cloud watermarker.

steps.title: Design Watermark
steps.description: Type text or upload a logo image.

steps.title: Apply & Download
steps.description: Get your watermarked PDF in one click.

sections.title: Document Watermarking in São Paulo
sections.content: Legal and creative professionals in São Paulo stamp documents with watermarks without cloud uploads.

sections.title: Confidential Drafts Stay Private
sections.content: Draft contracts and unreleased designs watermarked locally without any server contact.

sections.title: Stamp Thousands of Pages Instantly
sections.content: Apply watermarks to a 1000-page document in under 3 seconds. All in your browser.

faqs.q: Can I use a logo as a watermark?
faqs.a: Yes, upload a PNG logo and set transparency.

faqs.q: Can I apply it to specific pages only?

faqs.a: Yes, rotate watermarks to any angle.
